title: Vision Sequence Results
description:
Vision Sequence Results

Vision Sequence Results

Vision sequence results apply to the entire vision sequence.  They are useful because they tell you information about the vision sequence as a whole.  For example, the AllFound result returns whether all vision objects within the vision sequence were found.

The following list is a summary of sequence results. For more details, click on a result name.

Result	Description

AllFound	Returns whether all vision objects within the sequence were found.

Time	Returns the total execution time for the vision sequence.  This includes the cumulative time for all vision objects as well as the time required to acquire an image.
